name: Rocketeer
description: The Rocketeer is a Vladof launcher built around rapid compact rockets and unusually good ammo efficiency for its class. It fires quickly, deals splash damage in either explosive or elemental form, and spends just 2 rounds per shot where similar launchers often demand much more. That efficiency is its real selling point, especially in longer fights where launcher ammo matters.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher. If it spawns without an accessory or elemental capacitor, it uses the standard grip prefix rather than a unique one. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
